subcodes.first_line: O melodious bird of the garden of praise! For some time now the sweet melodies of that dove of the meadows of divine glorification have reached the ear [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای طیر خوش الحان حدیقه ثناء چندیست که نغمات آن حمامه ریاض محامد الهی بسمع
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @call to action, @praise and encouragement, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
